ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "n_references" INTEGER /* Total number of references in the paper */,
  "n_references_incommon_mvtec_citations" INTEGER /* Number of references that are also cited by MVTech */,
  "percent_references_incommon_mvtec_citations" REAL /* Percentage of references that are also cited by MVTech */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations the paper has received */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the paper */,
  "is_latest_version" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the paper is the latest version */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal where the paper is published */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the paper is published */,
  "paper_status" TEXT /* Status of the paper (e.g., published, under review, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper citing the reference */,
  "cited_paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the cited paper */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or snippet of the citation in the paper */,
  "is_mvtec_citation" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the citation is from MVTech */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_context_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the citation context for quick reference */,
  "citation_score" INTEGER /* Score indicating the importance of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, academic, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or ID of the user's profile picture */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID ID of the user for unique identification */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the user, which is a measure of their research impact */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Total number of citations the user has received across all their papers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_papers" (
  "user_paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-paper relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper */,
  "contribution_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the paper (e.g., author, co-author) */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution to the paper */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the user's contribution to the paper */,
  "is_corresponding_author" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is the corresponding author of the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_papers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_papers_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project leader */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed, on hold) */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_papers" (
  "project_paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-paper relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the project's contribution to the paper */,
  "project_contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the project's contribution to the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_papers_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_papers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation event */,
  "citing_paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper citing the reference */,
  "cited_paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the cited paper */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or snippet of the citation in the paper */,
  "citing_paper_version" TEXT /* Version of the citing paper */,
  "cited_paper_version" TEXT /* Version of the cited paper */,
  "citation_importance" INTEGER /* Score indicating the importance of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations_incommon" (
  "citation_incommon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation in common */,
  "citing_paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper citing the reference */,
  "cited_paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the cited paper */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context or snippet of the citation in the paper */,
  "citing_paper_version" TEXT /* Version of the citing paper */,
  "cited_paper_version" TEXT /* Version of the cited paper */,
  "citation_importance" INTEGER /* Score indicating the importance of the citation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_incommon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_incommon_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_incommon_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword associated with the paper */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper */,
  "keyword_weight" INTEGER /* Score indicating the importance of the keyword in the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the research area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research area */,
  "area_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the research area based on impact or popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_areas" (
  "paper_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper-area relationship */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research area */,
  "contribution_description" TEXT /* Description of the paper's contribution to the research area */,
  "area_contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the paper's contribution to the research area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_areas_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_paper_areas_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES research_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the paper */,
  "paper_id" TEXT /* ID of the paper being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the paper was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
